case_title: GAURAV JAIN ET AL VS. LISA LI

docket_entries.description: REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD BY MAIL SUBMITTED BY PLANTIFF

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JAIN, GAURAV JAIN, ANURUPA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LI, LISA $7,037.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,187.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

NOT REPORTED. (506)
